SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AdminBrowseEventsActivity
AdminBrowseEventsActivity allows an administrator to view all events stored in Firestore and permanently delete any of them.
AdminBrowseImagesActivity
Allows admin to browse images uploaded (event posters and profile pictures) and remove any that violate app policy US 03.03.01 - As an admin, I want to be able to remove images US 03.06.01 - As an admin, I want to browse images
AdminBrowseOrganizersActivity
activity for admin to browse/remove organizers diaplays list of all organizers, allows admin to demote organizers to users and deletes all events they made Implements User story 03.05.01
AdminBrowseProfilesActivity
Activity where admins can browse and remove user profiles Implements user story 03.02.01
AdminCommentAdapter
AdminCommentAdapter is a RecyclerView adapter for AdminEventDetailActivity Each row is a comment's author and the "Remove" button so the admin can delete comments that violate app policy (and note which user to remove if necessary).
AdminCommentAdapter.CommentItem
CommentItem contains one comment row
AdminCommentAdapter.CommentViewHolder
CommentViewHolder holds reference to views in one comment row
AdminCommentAdapter.OnDeleteClickListener
Callback interface for the "Remove" button
AdminEventAdapter
AdminEventAdapter is a RecyclerView adapter used by AdminBrowseEventsActivity.
AdminEventAdapter.EventItem
EventItem is a simple data container (a "model") for one row in the events list.
AdminEventAdapter.EventViewHolder
EventViewHolder holds references to the views inside one event row (item_admin_event.xml).
AdminEventAdapter.OnDeleteClickListener
OnDeleteClickListener is a callback interface.
AdminEventAdapter.OnRowClickListener
callback interface for tapping a row (not the delete button)
AdminEventDetailActivity
AdminEventDetailActivity shows details of an event when clicked on from the admin browsing but only the relevant details and the comments (so comments can be removed) Only "relevant" details are the fields that the user can freely fill out, because those ones could contain policy violations.
AdminHomeActivity
AdminHomeActivity is the main home page for admin to browse (and delete) events/profiles/images (and later notifications, too) User stories: 03.01.01, 03.02.01, 03.03.01
AdminImageAdapter
RecyclerView adapter for image thumbnail, image type label (poster or Profile Photo) label (event title or user name), remove button US 03.03.01 and US 03.06.01
AdminImageAdapter.ImageItem
Data container for one image row
AdminImageAdapter.ImageViewHolder
ImageViewHolder holds reference to views in one image row
AdminImageAdapter.OnDeleteClickListener
Callback interface for Remove button
AdminNotificationAdapter
RecyclerView adapter for AdminNotificationLogActivity US 03.08.01 - as an admin, I want to review notification logs
AdminNotificationAdapter.NotifItem
NotifItem data container for one notification row
AdminNotificationAdapter.NotifViewHolder
NotifViewHolder holds references to views inside one notification
AdminNotificationLogActivity
allows admin to review all notifications that've been sent No notifications get deleted.
AdminOrganizerAdapter
RecyclerView Adapter for browsing organizers as an admin Takes list of OrganizerItem objects, binds them to layout for display
AdminOrganizerAdapter.OnDemoteClickListener
interface for remove organizer status button clicks (demote button)
AdminOrganizerAdapter.OrganizerItem
simple class for holding one organizer row
AdminOrganizerAdapter.OrganizerViewHolder
VieHolder class for one organizer row, chaches references for efficiency
AdminUnitTest
Unit tests for admin functionality.
AdminUserAdapter
Adapter for browsing profiles as an admin, takes a list of UserItem objects and makes them into the item_admin_user layout (so admins can browse them) using a RecyclerView
AdminUserAdapter.OnDeleteClickListener
interface to handle delete button clicks
AdminUserAdapter.UserItem
simple class to hold the info for one user row, containing all of their info for ease of use
AdminUserAdapter.UserViewHolder
The ViewHolder class, holds the view for one user row, cachine the view references
BaseActivity
 
CommentsUserTest
 
CreateEvent
Organizer creates and edits events.
DeviceUtils
retrieves a unique ID for an android device
Entrants
Entrants names who have joined, cancelled, enrolled, or joined the waiting list of an event.
EntrantUnitTests
US 02.06.02 As an organizer I want to see a list of all the cancelled entrants.
Event
Event specific information - details that organizer inputs
EventData
Stores all created events data can search for an event by ID and add and edit
EventDetailsActivity
Provides details for events, such as the eventID, waitlists Allows user to join wait list and leave waitlist Displays comments
EventHistory
Shows users history of events they have interacted in Allows user to view details of events they have interacted in Accessed from profile
EventPreview
Allows you to see the preview of an event before it is published - How it will look to users Organizer can go back to editing or upload the event back on the create/edit screen
EventSearchActivity
Activity for searching and filtering public events Implements: US 01.01.04: Search by keyword US 01.01.05: Search by tag/category US 01.01.06: Search by date/capacity range
EventSearchAdapter
Adapter for displaying Event objects in a ListView during a search Binds Event data to item_search_result.xml layout
EventTestData
Fake event data for testing
ExampleInstrumentedTest
Instrumented test, which will execute on an Android device.
ExampleUnitTest
Example local unit test, which will execute on the development machine (host).
FirebaseManager
Class for defining firebase methods and loading in the firebase instance
GuidelinesActivity
displays guidelines for a lottery user stories implemented: - US 01.05.05: Entrant wants to know the criteria or guidelines for the lottery selection process.
InvitationAdapter
adapter for displaying a list of invitations (normal, private, co-organizer)
InvitationAdapter.InvitationListener
listener interface for accept/decline actions
InvitationAdapter.ViewHolder
viewholder for each invitation row
InvitationItem
represents an invitation to an event events are identified via ID and name/title
InvitationsActivity
Provides logic for invitations to an event, including accepting/declining an invite.
LanguageHelper
 
ListOfMyEvents
Views list of the organizers events Shows: - event title - description, - an edit button to edit the event, - and a QR code button to view the qrcode associated with the event Buttons functions: - edit buttons opens CreateEvent screen - QR code button opens a qrcode pop up screen
ListOfMyEvents.EventViewHolder
holds the view of each event item shows event title, description and an edit button to edit the event
MainActivity
Main activity for the app.
MapActivity
Organizer can see location of entrants who joined a specific event waitList Uses google maps Displays a mini map of pinned entrants location - Clicking mini map navigates to a full screen map of the entrants location Displays a list of the entrants with their name and coordinates US 02.02.02 As an organizer I want to see on a map where entrants joined my event waiting list from.
NotificationHelper
Utility class for sending in-app notifications to entrants via Firestore.
NotificationUnitTest
Local unit tests for notification opt-out logic.
organizerNotifications
Organizer can send notifications to users US 02.07.01: Sends notifications to all entrants on the waiting list US 02.07.02: Sends notifications to all selected entrants US 02.07.03: Sends a notification to all cancelled entrants US 02.05.01: Sends a notification to chosen entrants to sign up for events
organizerNotifications.NotificationCallback
Callback for sending notifications
OrganizerNotificationsUnitTest
Local unit tests for organizer notifications.
OrganizerStartScreen
Home screen for organizer - create events - view entrants - view my events - edit events - View map - send notifications - View event QR code
OrganizerUnitTest
Unit tests for Organizer functionality.
OrganizerUnitTest.CreatePublicEventAndQRCodeTests
UnitTests to test US 02.01.01 - testing creating an event - testing QR code generation
OrganizerUnitTest.GeoLocationTests
UnitTests to test US 02.02.02 and 02.02.03
OrganizerUnitTest.PosterTests
UnitTests to test US 02.04.01 and 02.04.02
OrganizerUnitTest.SampleTest
UnitTests to test US 02.05.02
PrivateEventUnitTest
Local unit tests for private event, notification, and invitation logic.
PrivateInviteActivity
US 02.01.03 Allows an organizer to invite specific entrants to a private event's waiting list by searching via name, phone number, and/or email.
ProfileActivity
creates a profile for a user
ProfileActivityTest
unit tests related to ProfileActivity logic tests run locally and verify user creation
QRandPrivateinviteUnitTest
Local unit tests for QR code scanning and private invite accept/decline logic.
QRScanActivity
US 01.06.01 Entrant wants to be able to view event details by scanning a QR code.
SearchUnitTest
Unit tests for event search/filtering
SelectAnEvent
Allows organizer to select an event to view entrants or map.
SettingsActivity
Settings activity for the app Allows the user to change the language of the app Options: English (default), french, russian
User
Class defining user, includes profile information and role
UserHomeActivity
Home page for the entrant/user.
UserNotificationsActivity
Displays all in-app notifications for the current user.
UserSession
Class to get and set the current user.
UserTestData
fake user data for testing
UserUnitTest
unit tests related to UserHomeActivity logic tests
ZoomedInMap
Displays an enlarged map of the entrants location Shows user as a pinned location on the map
